name: External review classification
about: Classify the finite-center support/readout package as known, false, missing-hypothesis, or checkable
title: "External review: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Reviewer

- Name:
- Affiliation:
- Relevant expertise:
- Public/private attribution preference:

## Verdict

Choose the closest classification:

- [ ] Known result / demote novelty
- [ ] False statement / counterexample
- [ ] Missing or unstated positive hypothesis
- [ ] Too broad physically
- [ ] Proof-polish issue
- [ ] Package/hash/build issue
- [ ] Lean abstraction mismatch
- [ ] New but checkable finite-central classification
- [ ] Decline / outside expertise

## Evidence

- Exact theorem name, source, or citation if known:
- Counterexample or missing hypothesis if false/overbroad:
- Affected file, theorem row, page, or Lean declaration:
- Build/hash command affected, if any:

## Minimum Recommended Action

Choose the smallest action that preserves honesty:

- [ ] No change
- [ ] Demote novelty language
- [ ] Add citation/theorem name
- [ ] Clarify assumptions
- [ ] Narrow comparison class
- [ ] Correct proof prose
- [ ] Correct Lean abstraction boundary
- [ ] Correct package/hash/build issue
- [ ] Retract or rewrite claim

## Notes

Short, decisive responses are preferred. A theorem name, counterexample, or
missing hypothesis is more useful than encouragement.
